title: logformatter: ignore 'TOP-LEVEL' headings
body:
When an e2e test fails in AfterEach, ginkgo "helpfully" adds
a heading in that test log block:

  TOP-LEVEL [AfterEach]
  /path/to/source.go
    Podman Desc Blah

That TOP-LEVEL line screws up our in-page links. Ignore it
both in the heading and in the bottom failure-summary lines.

Add test, including tests for bottom-summary.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Several flakes in logs, but none in a TOP-LEVEL section, so I can't link to proof that the new code works. All I can do is assert that I tested it on my laptop using [the log that triggered this bug](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/6373332413579264/logs/main.log).
